headline: The Foundation Release - The Arena, Re-Engineered.
author: OM Rajput
releaseNotes: Introduces the first official production-signed Vlither Enhanced Android release.
Rebuilds Home, Settings, Controls and Update Center around the graphite-and-emerald interface system.
Adds left- and right-handed mobile control layouts with floating or fixed joystick and boost behavior.
Adds draggable joystick, boost and zoom positions with size, opacity and orientation controls.
Reduces mobile texture pressure while preserving the native Vulkan arena presentation.
Adds signed GitHub update verification, durable preference backups and user-approved installation.
Preserves the renderer-driven Skin Editor preview, color palette and accessory workflow.
Developed, signed and maintained by OM Rajput.
